difficulty.reason: Frost-sensitive, needs trellis training, consistent watering critical

growth_stages.name: Transplant
growth_stages.look_for: Small plant with rough hairy leaves settling in at trellis base

prompt.en: Plant it right at the bottom of the climbing frame -- it needs something to climb!
prompt.da: Plant den lige ved bunden af klatrestativet -- den har brug for noget at klatre paa!

growth_stages.name: Climbing
growth_stages.look_for: Curly tendrils reaching out, vine climbing the trellis

prompt.en: The cucumber is climbing! Help the curly bits grab the wire -- they're like tiny fingers!
prompt.da: Agurken klatrer! Hjaelp de krullede dele med at gribe traaden -- de er som bitte fingre!

growth_stages.name: Flowering
growth_stages.look_for: Yellow star-shaped flowers, some with tiny baby cucumbers behind them

prompt.en: Look behind the yellow flowers -- see the tiny green finger? That's a baby cucumber!
prompt.da: Kig bag de gule blomster -- ser du den lille groenne finger? Det er en baby-agurk!

growth_stages.name: Fruiting
growth_stages.look_for: Mini cucumbers about 8-10cm long hanging from the trellis

prompt.en: Twist the little cucumber off the vine -- crunch! Eat it like a snack right here!
prompt.da: Drej den lille agurk af ranken -- knasss! Spis den som en snack lige her!

human_readable.en: Water deeply and consistently. Cucumbers HATE drying out. Water at soil level, not on leaves.
human_readable.da: Vand grundigt og jaevnt. Agurker HADER at toerre ud. Vand ved jordoverfladen, ikke paa bladene.

harvest.notes: Mini snack cucumbers: pick at 8-10cm for best flavor. Grows on A-frame trellis. Benefits from pea nitrogen in soil.

companion_plants.notes: Borage attracts pollinators for cucumber flowers. Benefits from nitrogen left by pea roots.

message.en: Cucumbers need water NOW -- they get bitter and stop producing if dry!
message.da: Agurker har brug for vand NU -- de bliver bitre og stopper med at producere, hvis de er toerre!

message.en: Cold warning for cucumbers! Cover or bring indoors if below 4C.
message.da: Kuldeadvarsel for agurker! Daek eller tag ind, hvis under 4 grader.
